title: diervilla × splendens
intro: Diervilla × splendens, also known as the yellow fringed bush, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Diervilla genus, resulting from the cross between Diervilla lonicera and Diervilla sessilifolia. This shrub-like plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Diervilla × splendens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
